commit_message:
Update pkgdown.yaml

Only run at publication step

Use dev version of SticsRFiles for tests

Packages are developed synchronously so tests in the dev version of croplotr should use the dev version of SticsRFiles. 
SticsRFiles is now suggested at release version for users (from previous commit).

Update pkgdown.yaml

Only run at publication step
Update vignettes wrt new content of optim_results.Rdata

fix: avail_sit, for avoiding sub-directories in list (i.e. plant for example)
force_param_values removed from .export, already exported in the foreach loop
changes: filtering new hierarchical node "formalismev" in plant files for varietal parameters

Update R-CMD-check.yaml

Make sure all SticsRPacks packages install as dev version
